'''watoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oban|oban]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oban|oban]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| watoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæteheth|wæteheth]] || [[word:wætehej|wætehej]] || [[word:wætehesh|wætehesh]] || [[word:wætehe|wætehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:watotohoth|watotohoth]] || [[word:watotohoj|watotohoj]] || [[word:watotohosh|watotohosh]] || [[word:watotoho|watotoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:watohoth|watohoth]] || [[word:watohoj|watohoj]] || [[word:watohosh|watohosh]] || [[word:watoho|watoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:watofhoth|watofhoth]] || [[word:watofhoj|watofhoj]] || [[word:watofhosh|watofhosh]] || [[word:watofhof|watofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:watohotho|watohotho]] || [[word:watohojo|watohojo]] || [[word:watohosho|watohosho]] || [[word:watohoko|watohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:watohoth|watohoth]] || [[word:watohoj|watohoj]] || [[word:watohosh|watohosh]] || [[word:watoho|watoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:watohothol|watohothol]] || [[word:watohojol|watohojol]] || [[word:watohoshol|watohoshol]] || [[word:watohokol|watohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:watohothotho|watohothotho]] || [[word:watohojojo|watohojojo]] || [[word:watohoshosho|watohoshosho]] || [[word:watohoko|watohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:watohothon|watohothon]] || [[word:watohojon|watohojon]] || [[word:watohoshon|watohoshon]] || [[word:watohokon|watohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:watohothoro|watohothoro]] || [[word:watohojoro|watohojoro]] || [[word:watohoshoro|watohoshoro]] || [[word:watohokoro|watohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
